sql_array: CREATE TABLE test_uniq (id UInt32, value String, timestamp DateTime);
INSERT INTO test_uniq (id, value, timestamp) VALUES (1, 'alpha', now()), (2, 'beta', now()), (3, 'alpha', now());
SELECT uniqHLL12(value) AS unique_count FROM test_uniq;
UPDATE test_uniq SET value = 'gamma' WHERE id = 2;
SELECT uniqHLL12(value) AS unique_count_after_update FROM test_uniq;
